name: Linus Pauling
abstract: Linus Carl Pauling ( PAW-ling; February 28, 1901 – August 19, 1994) was an American chemist and peace activist. He published more than 1,200 papers and books, of which about 850 dealt with scientific topics.

concerts.label: Meeting: National Committee for a Sane Nuclear Policy
Conference of Greater New York Peace Groups

about_quotes.speaker: Gordon Lorraine
about_quotes.evidence: Ava Helen Pauling, who was a lovely woman who I had known, Linus and her.
